description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (2.7, 3.5, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9). For each version, check out the repository, set up Python, upgrade pip, install dependencies from requirements-dev.txt, and run tox.
